title: Total tax offsets 2023
description: Complete this question with the total tax offsets in your tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, supplement, tax offsets, total tax offsets, supplement tax offsets, tax return 2023, instructions, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: To complete this question, follow the steps below.
Check that you have claimed all the tax offsets you are eligible for.
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at questions T2 and T in your tax return. (We work out the amounts at question T1 automatically.)
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX OFFSETS – label U on page 5 in your tax return.

items: Go to question M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2023 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
Go back to Tax offsets in the supplementary tax return 2023 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
To complete this question, follow the steps below.
### Step 1
Check that you have claimed all the tax offsets you are eligible for.
### Step 2
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at questions T2 and T in your tax return. (We work out the amounts at question T1 automatically.)
### Step 3
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX OFFSETS – label U on page 5 in your tax return.
## Where to go next
- Go to question M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2023 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
- Go back to Tax offsets in the supplementary tax return 2023 .
